pi_items.source: AMOS 2022 Official Grand Challenge Documentation and Dataset Description
Scientific literature on aortic dimensions (e.g., 'Normative Reference Values of Abdominal Aortic Diameters', Nature and Science 2018)
DynaMedex, TeachMeSurgery, and Society for Vascular Surgery (SVS) Guidelines

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data generated to simulate an abdominal CT scan. The anatomical bounds for filtering aortic cross-sectional area (CSA) are set between 200 mm² and 2000 mm², which is a clinically sound range for abdominal aortic segments.
